mnemonics.title: CUDA Trap I Host Workflow
mnemonics.content: MILK-CF: Malloc, Init-zero (memset), Launch kernel, Kopy back (memcpy), times-h Compute Final answer, Free memory

mnemonics.title: atomicAdd Problems
mnemonics.content: SND: Serialization (threads wait in line), Non-determinism (different order each run), Degraded performance (O(n) not O(n/p))
